_description: Scheduling config for the entire trading team. Defines when each periodic job runs, market hours, session windows, and cache refresh policies.

market_hours._note: Forex market: Sunday 5pm ET → Friday 5pm ET. All times in ET.

sessions._note: Four forex sessions. Times in ET. Overlaps are where liquidity is highest.

best_window._note: London-NY overlap. Highest liquidity, tightest spreads.

cycle._note: The main trading cycle — when orchestrator runs a full analysis and decision loop.

trade_monitor._note: Position watchdog. Only active when trades are open.

intelligence_refresh._note: Periodic data refresh jobs for the intelligence agent. Keeps cache warm so cycle runs are fast.

macro_data._note: Interest rates, inflation, GDP, unemployment, trade balances. Slow-moving data.
macro_data._reasoning: Macro data updates weekly/monthly. One morning refresh gives the whole team current data all day. 24h TTL means it never goes stale during trading hours.

news_scan._note: Economic calendar and breaking news. Fast-moving.
news_scan._reasoning: News changes fast. 15-min refresh matches cycle interval so every cycle has fresh news. The trade_monitor checks news_proximity from the cache between cycles.

weather_check._note: Severe weather that could disrupt markets (hurricanes, earthquakes near financial centers).
weather_check._reasoning: Weather changes slowly. 30-min refresh is plenty. Only matters for extreme events.

oil_energy._note: Crude oil and energy prices. Matters for CAD, NOK, and risk sentiment.
oil_energy._reasoning: Oil updates throughout the day but doesn't need per-cycle checking. 4h is enough for forex impact.

cross_rates._note: DXY (dollar index) and major cross rates for context.
cross_rates._reasoning: DXY and gold give broad market context. Hourly refresh catches shifts without burning API calls.

reporter._note: End-of-day summary and knowledge store update.

daily_summary._note: Runs 30 min after market close. Summarizes day's trades, P&L, lessons.

weekly_summary._note: Runs 1 hour after Friday close. Weekly performance review.

knowledge_maintenance._note: Periodic knowledge store cleanup and pattern refresh.
knowledge_maintenance._reasoning: Run before the macro refresh. Clean house first, then load fresh data.

cache_policy._note: How each data category flows through the system. Intelligence fetches and caches. Other agents read from cache. Only intelligence writes to cache.
cache_policy._flow: Intelligence agent writes to IntelligenceStore cache → other agents read from cache via get_cached(). No agent except intelligence makes external API calls for macro/news/weather data.
